comments: Approved. The execution contract is tightly bounded to the intended V0.8-M1 foundation and matches the recon packet's stated objectives. Scope is limited to: (1) backward-compatible .agent-state/workflow/dispatch.json resolution in src/mcp-server/src/index.ts with fallback to legacy workflow/dispatch.json, (2) creation of the foundational src/mcp-server/src/dag-parser.ts for YAML DAG parsing into execution-contract style outputs, and (3) init-script/documentation updates for the new .agent-state/workflows layout. The out_of_scope section correctly forbids dynamic LLM router implementation, SubAgent review automation daemon logic, legacy tooling removal, and semantic changes to active workflow/dispatch.json state beyond standard M1 progression. allowed_files and stop_conditions reinforce these boundaries and prevent contract drift into later milestones.
